examples: "Luff, you lubber," cried an Irish voice that was Smee's; "here's the rock."
Keel-hauling, was you? And a mighty suitable thing, too, and you may lay to that. Get back to your place for a lubber, Tom.
Mindy Lubber is president of Ceres and director of the Investor Network on Climate Risk (INCR).
Mindy S. Lubber is the president of Ceres and a founding board member of the organization.
Mindy Lubber is the president of Ceres, a non-profit organization mobilizing business leadership on climate change.
